description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
 
On October 20, 2024 at 6:57 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a 
collision involving an SUV on Stoner Avenue at Lindblade Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southeast on Stoner Avenue, and stopped at a stop sign at the intersection with Lindblade Street with an SUV 
following behind. As the Waymo AV finished traversing the intersection, the trailing SUV entered the opposing lane of travel, passing the 
Waymo AV, and the passenger side of the SUV made contact with the driver side of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo 
AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The Waymo AV sustained damage and the SUV left the scene.
Print
Clear Form
